rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. the examiner has no specific concerns with the language in the proposed documents, however, as the petition is for substituted judgment, the pleadings should be before the judicial officer in a hearing. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PEGGIE CHAPPELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/17/19. Courtesy copies of all filed documents requiring Court review or action have not been provided pursuant to Local Rules 2.7 and 14.93G. Filed stamped copy of the Status of Administration filed on 6/12/19 must be delivered to Room 202 at least 2 weeks prior to the continued hearing date, along with a proposed order. It is noted that a Notice of Hearing still has not been filed (which must contain the language required under Probate Code 12201(b)). It is also noted that a separate Status of Administration was filed on 8/12/19, which will be ignored, as no filing fees were paid and no hearing date set thereon (any supplemental pleadings to the 6/12/19 report of status must be titled properly (e.g. "Supplemental Declaration in Support of Status... filed on..."))
